stemHtml: What is a visual check point?

options.a: A pre-determined feature, marked on the chart, used for describing your location to Air Traffic Control.
options.b: A feature, or group of features, that is/ are clearly marked on the chart and are easily identifiable on the ground, standing out from the background. Selected as waypoints for visual route navigation.
options.c: A ground feature used to check the visibility and RVR on the runway.
options.d: A point on the approach to an airfield at which you assess the chances of making a visual approach.
